title: Session System State
description: Machine-readable project state. Single source of truth for session persistence.

current_phase.description: ID of the currently active phase, or null if no work has started

current_session.description: Current session number. Incremented at session start.

phases.description: Map of phase ID to phase status

blocked_by.description: Phase IDs that must complete before this phase can start

started_session.description: Session number when work began on this phase

completed_session.description: Session number when this phase was marked complete

prs.description: PR numbers associated with this phase

last_verified.description: ISO timestamp of last successful state verification

read_token_secret.description: GitHub secret name for enforcement repo read access

dispatch_token_secret.description: GitHub secret name for dispatching enforcement gate

protected_files.description: List of protected file paths (synced from enforcement repo)
